mapper.sql: id, email, name, role, status, last_login_at, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT permission_code, display_name, description, active, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_permission_policy ORDER BY permission_code

SELECT g.group_code, g.display_name, g.description, g.active, g.created_at, g.updated_at, COUNT(i.id) AS item_count FROM admin_permission_group g LEFT JOIN admin_permission_group_item i ON i.group_code = g.group_code GROUP BY g.group_code, g.display_name, g.description, g.active, g.created_at, g.updated_at ORDER BY g.group_code

SELECT p.permission_code, p.display_name, p.description, p.active, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM admin_permission_group_item i JOIN admin_permission_policy p ON p.permission_code = i.permission_code WHERE i.group_code = #{groupCode} ORDER BY p.permission_code

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.permission_code, policy.display_name, p.granted_by, p.granted_at FROM admin_user_permission p JOIN admin_permission_policy policy ON policy.permission_code = p.permission_code WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.revoked_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.granted_at DESC

SELECT g.id, g.user_id, g.group_code, policy.display_name, g.granted_by, g.granted_at FROM admin_user_group g JOIN admin_permission_group policy ON policy.group_code = g.group_code WHERE g.user_id = #{userId} AND g.revoked_at IS NULL ORDER BY g.granted_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET role = #{role}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_permission_policy (permission_code, display_name, description, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{code}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{actorId}, #{actorId})
INSERT INTO admin_permission_group (group_code, display_name, description, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{code}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{actorId}, #{actorId})
INSERT IGNORE INTO admin_permission_group_item (group_code, permission_code, created_by) VALUES (#{groupCode}, #{permissionCode}, #{actorId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM admin_permission_group_item WHERE group_code = #{groupCode} AND permission_code = #{permissionCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_user_permission SET revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND permission_code = #{permissionCode} AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE admin_user_permission SET revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE admin_user_group SET revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND group_code = #{groupCode} AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE admin_user_group SET revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_at IS NULL
